title: Create: More Copycats
description: Adds a whole bunch more copycat blocks to the game based on creates copycat blocks
body:
### NOTE: This mod is now deprecated in favour of [Create: Copycats+](https://bennyboy1695.github.io/redirect/?url=https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) a mod that is co-made by me, with the Dev of Create: Connected and Create: Copies and Cats. The mod has all the same features as this mod and more better features!

Create: More Copycats is a mod that adds a whole bunch more copycat blocks for your to decorate your base/train/contraption/whatever with.

### Extra Features:
All the blocks added by the mod can be **Shift R-Clicked** with an empty hand to toggle connectivity. This means any block inserted into it with a connected texture can be toggled


### Currently Added Blocks:
- Full Block
- Slab
- Carpet
- Layer (Snow Layer Essentially)
- Stair
- Vertical Step


### Planned Additions:
- Wall
- Fence
- Fabric Version of mod
